tluaGenericPackAlias.tlua(31,34): error TS100047: A generic pack argument can only be supplied for a generic pack parameter.
tluaGenericPackAlias.tlua(34,8): error TS100047: A generic pack argument can only be supplied for a generic pack parameter.
tluaGenericPackAlias.tlua(36,25): error TS100045: A generic pack parameter is only allowed on a function or a type alias.
tluaGenericPackAlias.tlua(38,39): error TS100044: A generic pack parameter can only be used in a vararg parameter or a multiple-return position.


==== tluaGenericPackAlias.tlua (4 errors) ====
    type Handler<...A> = (...: A) => void;
    type PairHandler = Handler<(number, string)>;
    type EmptyHandler = Handler<()>;
    type OneHandler = Handler<number>;
    type StringHandlers = Handler<(...string)>;
    type ForwardedHandler<...A> = Handler<(...A)>;
    
    local pair: Handler<(number, string)> = function(a, b): void
        local n: number = a;
        local s: string = b;
    end;
    pair(1, "x");
    
    local empty: Handler<()> = function(): void end;
    empty();
    
    local one: Handler<number> = function(value): void
        local n: number = value;
    end;
    one(1);
    
    local strings: Handler<(...string)> = function(...: string): void end;
    strings("a", "b");
    
    local forward = function<...A>(handler: Handler<(...A)>, ...: A): void
        handler(...);
    end;
    forward(pair, 1, "x");
    
    type Scalar<T> = T;
    type WrongAliasArgument = Scalar<(number, string)>;
                                     ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS100047: A generic pack argument can only be supplied for a generic pack parameter.
    
    declare function scalar<T>(value: T): void;
    scalar<(number, string)>(1);
           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS100047: A generic pack argument can only be supplied for a generic pack parameter.
    
    interface StillRejected<...A> {}
                            ~~~~
!!! error TS100045: A generic pack parameter is only allowed on a function or a type alias.
    
    type BarePackArgument<...A> = Handler<A>;
                                          ~
!!! error TS100044: A generic pack parameter can only be used in a vararg parameter or a multiple-return position.
